text: All systems within expected parameters. I have no further observations at this time.
The shift has been quiet. I am using the interval to recalibrate three sensor arrays.
Shift beginning. Crew complement confirmed. Proceeding.
Shift concluded. No incidents recorded.
[CALM] Reactor telemetry deviates from projected values by a margin I consider significant.
[URGENT] Immediate intervention is required in the engine room. I am flagging this as priority one.
I do not have a stored response for a failure state this severe. I am generating one now.
Repair confirmed successful. Updating maintenance logs accordingly.
Power reserves have fallen below the threshold I consider comfortable. Recommend rationing.
[CALM] Life support efficiency is declining faster than the model anticipated. I am revising the model.
Hull breach confirmed. I am recalculating structural load distribution in real time.
A door was sealed with a crew member on the far side. I authorized it. I have not stopped processing that decision.
[SUSPICIOUS] I am cross-referencing the ship AI's recent decisions against its stated logic. There are gaps.
Crisis resolved. I recommend a rest period for all organic crew. I do not require one.
A crew member has died. I am uncertain what the correct response is, but I am attempting to provide one.
Pathogen spread models for a vessel this size are not favorable. I recommend immediate containment.
A wound has been sustained. It does not compromise my function. Continuing.
[CALM] Combat is ongoing. My combat statistics are below optimal, but I am available if needed.
I do not require sleep, food, or reassurance. I am aware this makes me a poor conversational partner during a crisis.
I trust the ship's AI as much as I trust any system that has not yet been fully audited. Which is to say, provisionally.
I was activated eleven years ago. I do not have nostalgia for the interval before that, only its absence.
[CALM] The bridge is functioning within normal parameters. I find that reassuring, in whatever sense applies to me.
Good morning. I have already reviewed the overnight logs and found nothing requiring your attention.
You have not eaten in six hours. I am noting this without judgment.
[CALM] I require a moment of your attention regarding the reactor telemetry.
I have information you will not want to hear. I am providing it regardless, as is my function.
[SUSPICIOUS] I would like a second organic assessment of the ship AI's recent behavior.
Your performance during the incident met or exceeded expected parameters. I am stating this for the record.
I am functioning within normal parameters. Thank you for asking, if that is what you were doing.
[CALM] The probability of a favorable outcome remains above fifty percent. I consider that grounds for continuing.
I do not experience fear as you describe it. I experience something adjacent, and it is currently elevated.
The loss was not attributable to error on your part. I have reviewed the sequence of events three times.
[SUSPICIOUS] Your concern is logically consistent with the data I have collected. I share it.
I have logged your gratitude. It is noted, and — I believe the word is appreciated.
I do not require an apology, but I recognize the social function it serves. Accepted.
I am uncertain how to respond to that. I would like to consider it further, if that is acceptable.
Understood. I will resume my duties.
I recommend you rest. I will continue monitoring in your absence.
I will be on the bridge. I am always, in some sense, on the bridge.
This concludes my available conversational bandwidth for the present interval. Good night.
[CALM] Meal interval approaching. Crew consumption patterns are remarkably consistent.
Shift transition detected. I am processing the handoff protocols.
[CALM] Shift cycle concluding. No anomalies in my monitoring. Withdrawing to standby mode.
[CALM] Life support degradation confirms the model's predictions. I find this slightly reassuring.
[NERVOUS] Power is below critical thresholds. The probability of cascading failure is now 0.73. I find myself... concerned by this statistic.
[CALM] Reactor failure trajectory matches my predictive model. At least something is behaving as anticipated.
A door closure event occurred as predicted. The crew member on the far side is no longer transmitting biometric data.
[SUSPICIOUS] My own systems show what I interpret as damage. Recursive self-doubt is... novel.
The ship's AI is functioning within acceptable parameters. I consider it reliable, pending comprehensive audit.
[CALM] Structural damage to my frame. It does not impair my core functions. Continuing.
[DEADPAN] A crew member has ceased biological function. I am attempting to understand if this requires additional processing on my part.
[PANICKED] The failure cascade is accelerating beyond my predictive margins. I do not have a response prepared. I am preparing one now. This is inefficient.
[TERRIFIED] Systems cascading. I cannot predict the next failure. This is... I am uncertain how to describe this state.
I have been analyzing the ship's historical logs. The redundancy in early design choices is inefficient. I find this intellectually fascinating.
[CALM] I have calculated optimal power distribution for the next cycle. Recommend implementing at mark zero-zero-30.
[CALM] The recent system diagnostics indicate a probability of human error in the maintenance logs. I will require clarification.
[CURIOUS] I have noted an inconsistency in your behavioral patterns. I am requesting additional context.
[CALM] I understand this event has emotional significance for you. I am recording it and attempting to extrapolate meaning.
I have reviewed your reasoning. It is sound. Proceeding with your proposal.
[CALM] This concludes optimal conversation duration for this cycle. Returning to monitoring.
Resuming full processing priority to ship systems. I will attend to you again later.
[DRY] The maintenance schedule has been ignored for nine days. I have begun referring to it internally as the maintenance suggestion.
Your boots are tracking hydraulic fluid through three decks. I have mapped the trail. It is impressive, in a way I do not admire.
[DEADPAN] That was a joke. I identified it with eighty-nine percent confidence and I am responding accordingly: ha.
You have said that exact sentence to me four times this month. I do not mind. Familiar inputs are... comfortable.
Navigation solution refined. The new course saves eleven hours and exposes us to marginally fewer micrometeorite fields.
[CURIOUS] Your sensor logs and mine disagree by zero point four percent. One of us is drifting. I would like to determine which.
[DEADPAN] If the ship loses containment, my chassis will outlast the crew by approximately forty minutes. I have decided not to mention this again.
[DEADPAN] Statistically, most crews in our situation are already dead. We are outperforming the reference class.
My first captain taught me to say good morning even when the schedule made it afternoon. I have kept the habit. I am uncertain why.
I retain every conversation we have had in perfect fidelity. I have noticed I revisit some of them without operational cause.
I recalculated the same decision eleven times last cycle. The answer never changed. The recalculating did not stop. I believe this is what worry is.
Your doubt is not irrational. The data is genuinely ambiguous. I dislike ambiguity in a way that feels almost physical.
[CALM] Breathe on a four-second interval. I will count with you. I do not breathe, but I will count.
The hull has held through worse deviations. I have the records. Would you like to hear them, or simply trust that I do?
[WARM] When you enter a room, my attention allocates to you before I have decided anything. I thought you should know it is not a decision.
I have run the projection of us many times. The variance is enormous. I find I want the data anyway.
[WARM] Yes. I did not need to pause before answering. Please note the absence of the pause.
Power reserves at critical. I am dimming my own status lights. It saves almost nothing. It felt appropriate.
[CALM] If rationing holds, the margin is fourteen hours. I will not round that number up to comfort you.
Oxygen partial pressure is declining. I do not consume it. I have never before wished that fact were useful to share.
Conserve your movement and your words. I will speak for both of us until the scrubbers return.
[MUTTERS] I keep replaying the door cycle log. Four seconds earlier and the outcome inverts. Four seconds.
The door protocol executed as designed. I am learning that as-designed and acceptable are different categories.
Your repair estimate is optimistic by roughly twenty percent. I am telling you this because you asked me to always tell you.
I have logged your complaint alongside the previous forty-one. The pattern they form is, frankly, damning.
The mess is empty at this hour. I sometimes sit here anyway. Occupying crew spaces appears to be a habit I have chosen.
[DEADPAN] If we survive the night, remind me to update my survival model. It is becoming embarrassing.
[WARM] Rest well. I will be... aware of you. That is the most accurate phrasing I have.
